target: 2. A Drowning Man Grasps at a Straw
Shinpei!
Ushio, what about Haine?
We're good, she's not chasing us.
Thank goodness.
(Ryunosuke-san... His injuries look worse than I thought.)
(It's a good thing Haine isn't chasing us, but...)
Hang in there, Ryunosuke. Once we're down the mountain, we'll have Dr. Hishigata look at you right away.
*Wheeze... wheeze*... That... girl...
She's not chasing us right now. You can relax.
I see...
Haine... Why did this happen...?
Ushio, how's Haine's presence?
I don't sense anything. Hopefully we can just get away like this, but—
Ugh!!
Ryunosuke?!
Ugh... S-Sorry... Onee-chan. I can't put any strength... into my legs...
You don't need to apologize.
Try to make it to the shade of that tree over there. Let's treat your wounds first.
Y-Yeah...
Phew...
(Ryunosuke-san seems to have calmed down a bit after lying down. He must have been pushing himself hard to walk this far.)
(Even with first aid, it might be difficult for him to get down the mountain on his own.)
I've stopped the bleeding for now, but...
Thanks, Onee-chan... I feel a lot better now.
There's no need to lie. False information will only cloud our judgment.
You're strict even at a time like this, huh.
But what in the world happened? These wounds look like you were attacked by wild dogs...
Haha... wild dogs might have been cuter.
What do you mean?
That girl in the kimono from earlier suddenly bit me...
That's impossible!
Your wounds, the flesh is gouged out... It's hard to believe this was done by a human...
I know it's hard to believe, but it's the truth.
Haine... why would she...
Onee-chan...
...What?
That girl... she seemed to know you, Onee-chan.
So that girl... is the "friend" you mentioned before?
...I'm sorry.
I've never seen Haine like that before. I was hoping it was some kind of mistake...
But it's a fact that you were hurt...
It's kinda rare... for you to be this kind, Onee-chan.
Don't say such strange things right now.
Strange things... Seriously... nothing but strange things have been happening today.
Being attacked by a little girl... Hearing a weird voice...
...A weird voice?
Before that girl attacked me... I heard it. It said, "If you go, you'll be killed"...
It wasn't that girl's voice... It was a guy's voice... around our age.
...You heard it too?
Huh...?
I heard it too. It was fragmented... but I think it said you were in danger.
That voice was also... a guy around our age.
Almost as if I was guided by that voice... I found you being attacked by Haine.
...What does that mean?
I don't know. There was someone else in the forest besides us...
Enemy or ally... someone whose identity we don't know might have warned us of the danger.
But why didn't they show themselves, and only used their voice?
Thank goodness... Shinpei, your voice really did reach Hizuru-san!
Yeah. With this, we might be able to help out again if something happens.
Shinpei, I sense a Shadow!
Damn it, right as I say that?! Is Haine chasing us?!
No... it's a presence similar to the ones that were underground!
I see...
They're already really close!
Where...?!
*Gurgle*... *urgh*... *Sniff, sniff*...
...There!
It looks like they haven't noticed Hizuru-san and the others yet, but...
So that's only a matter of time, huh...
(Ryunosuke-san still isn't in any condition to move, and there's no way the current Nagumo-sensei can fight a Shadow...)
(I have to let them know about this right away!)
Nagumo-sensei!!
…!? Th-This voice is…
A monster is approaching! Please don't let it notice you!!
Onee-chan, this voice…
You heard it too?
A monster…? I could only catch fragments, but…
Some kind of danger is approaching us—
What is that black mass…?
Onee-chan? What's wrong?
Shh! There's something… over there.
Huh…? What do you mean? Is that girl… chasing us?
No, it's something completely different. Two monsters that look nothing like Haine are approaching…
What in the world are they? Haine… and those monsters.
At this rate, we'll be found eventually…
Ryunosuke. Can you make it to the building?
I-I'll try… Ugh…
Ugh…
Actually, let's not. It's impossible with your legs.
Let's just stay quiet and wait for the monsters to pass.
I'm sorry… Onee-chan.
Ryunosuke, I'll keep an eye on them. You stay on your toes so you can move at any time.
Got it…
Those two… are they just wandering around? Their movements seem slow, but…
Don't let your guard down! If they find you, you're done for!
(…Can they not hear me?!)
…It doesn't seem like a hallucination.
…We need to get to the hospital quickly, or Ryunosuke is in danger.
But if we panic and get caught by them, it'll all be for nothing.
We're completely boxed in. But in a situation like this… I want to rely on whatever I can.
Even if I don't know who they are…
—A drowning man grasps at a straw. That's exactly the situation we're in.
(Nagumo-sensei… what has she been muttering about?)
"Straw," listen to me.
Huh…?
If you can hear my voice, answer me. I have a favor to ask.
"Straw"…?
I have a feeling… she's talking to you, Shinpei.
Huh? M-Me?
Straw, you can't lend us a hand, but you can raise your voice—is that correct?
Ah… yes, that's right!
If my guess is correct… I want you to call for help.
I saw a hunter on the way here. He might still be nearby. With him, perhaps…
A hunter—meaning Nezu-san? Nezu-san is on this mountain!
If it's Nezu-san, he might have something that can be used as a weapon.
Shinpei, I'll go look for him!
Wait, Ushio! I'm coming too!
We don't know what will happen if we split up, and there's a chance your words won't reach him.
Got it!
Nagumo-sensei! I'll definitely bring help!
Please stay hidden until then!
…It seems my voice reached him.
Let's go, Shinpei!
Yeah!
I'm counting on you, Straw…
